rationale.R1.5: The agent has restructured the section flow to improve readability and coherence.
rationale.RX.1: While the agent flags some uncertainty by mentioning prior work, it does not mark confidence or missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested as it restructures the section without altering wording.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but introduces no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
